title: Senior Plant Manager at Reckitt India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Reckitt India
jsonLd.description:
Reckitt India has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Reckitt India:
Reckitt India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reckitt India!
